{metrics.graduationPipeline.map((level, idx) => (

))}
)}

{metrics.regionHeatmap.map((r, idx) => (

))}

); }

Active Sponsors

{totalActive}

Total Allocations

{totalAllocations}

Funding Model

Institutional
Governance Active

{/* List */}

Institutional Partners

{sponsors.length === 0 ? (

No corporate sponsors found

Onboard your first CSR partner to unlock bulk funding tools.

) : (
{sponsors.map((sponsor) => ( ))}
Organization Contact Funding Model Status & Capacity Allocated Actions
{sponsor.organizationName}
{sponsor.headquartersCountry}
{sponsor.contactPersonName}
{sponsor.contactEmail}
 {sponsor.fundingModel.replace('_', ' ')}
{sponsor.status}

)}
); }

"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { Settings as SettingsIcon, Shield, Globe, Bell, Mail, Database, CreditCard, Key, Lock, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; export function SettingsClient({ adminUser }: { adminUser: { name: string, email: string } }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<"profile" | "security" | "notifications" | "billing">("profile"); return (

Platform Settings

Manage institutional global configuration and security governance.

{/* Navigation Menu */}
{/* Content Area */}
{activeTab === "profile" && } {activeTab === "security" && } {activeTab === "notifications" && } {activeTab === "billing" && }
); } function ProfileTab({ adminUser }: { adminUser: { name: string, email: string } }) { const [status, setStatus] = useState<"idle" | "saving" | "saved">("idle"); const handleSave = () => { setStatus("saving"); setTimeout(() => setStatus("saved"), 800); setTimeout(() => setStatus("idle"), 3000); }; return (
{/* NGO Profile */}

NGO Core Identity

{/* Infrastructure Status */}

System Health

Operational
Database Connector (Neon) Stable (12ms)
Stripe Webhook Node Connected
Prisma Client Version v6.19.2
); } function SecurityTab() { const [status, setStatus] = useState<"idle" | "saving" | "saved">("idle"); const [mfa, setMfa] = useState(true); const [sessionTimeout, setSessionTimeout] = useState("30"); const handleSave = () => { setStatus("saving"); setTimeout(() => setStatus("saved"), 800); setTimeout(() => setStatus("idle"), 3000); }; return (

Security & Access Control

Configure global security policies for administrative accounts.

{/* MFA Toggle */}
setMfa(!mfa)}>

Require MFA for Admins

Force all admin accounts to use two-factor authentication.

{/* Session Timeout */}

Automatically log out inactive administrative sessions.

{/* Active Sessions */}

Active Sessions

Current Session (Chrome / Windows)

IP: 192.168.1.1 • Started 2 mins ago

Active
); } function NotificationsTab() { const [status, setStatus] = useState<"idle" | "saving" | "saved">("idle"); const [toggles, setToggles] = useState({ newDonation: true, largeDonation: true, newReferral: true, weeklyReport: false, systemAlerts: true }); const handleToggle = (key: keyof typeof toggles) => { setToggles(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] })); }; const handleSave = () => { setStatus("saving"); setTimeout(() => setStatus("saved"), 800); setTimeout(() => setStatus("idle"), 3000); }; return (

Admin Notifications

Control what automated emails the system sends to the governance team.

{/* Items */}
handleToggle("newDonation")}>

New Donation Alerts

Email when a new Stripe checkout succeeds.

handleToggle("largeDonation")}>

High Value Alerts

Immediate alerts for donations over $500.

handleToggle("newReferral")}>

New Child Referrals

Email when a new child referral is submitted for review.

handleToggle("systemAlerts")}>

Infrastructure Alerts

Errors from Stripe Webhooks or DB failures.

); } function BillingTab() { return (

Platform Billing

This NGO instance is currently running on the Enterprise Non-Profit Tier. Stripe infrastructure costs are managed externally via the Stripe Dashboard.

); }

Sponsorship Health Monitor

{/* Funding Gap Engine Table */} {/* Priority Queue & Funding Gap Engine Table */}

Priority Sponsorship Queue

{priorityQueue.length === 0 ? ( ) : ( priorityQueue.map((q: any) => ( )) )}
Child Name Funding Gap Priority Days At Risk
No children are currently in the emergency priority queue.
{q.childName} {q.fundingGap} Slots {q.priorityLevel === "CRITICAL" ? ( CRITICAL ) : ( HIGH )} {Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(q.createdAt).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))} Days

Children Requiring Sponsors

{report.all.filter((r: any) => !r.fullySponsored).length === 0 ? ( ) : ( report.all.filter((r: any) => !r.fullySponsored).map((child: any) => ( )) )}
Child Name Region Active / Max Status
All registered children are fully sponsored.
{child.name} {child.region} {child.activeSponsors} / {child.maxSponsors} {child.status === "CRITICAL" ? ( Critical Gap ) : ( At Risk )}
{/* Right Column */}
{/* Grace Period Sponsors */} {report.gracePeriodDetails && report.gracePeriodDetails.length > 0 && (

Grace Period

{report.gracePeriodDetails.map((g: any, i: number) => (

{g.donorName}

Child: {g.childName}

Expires: {new Date(g.graceUntil).toLocaleDateString()}

))}
)} {/* Automated Health Logs (Webhooks/Alerts) */}

Recent Lifecycle Events

{recentLogs.length === 0 ? (
No recent lifecycle alerts.
) : ( recentLogs.slice(0, 10).map((log: any) => (
{log.healthStatus.replace('_', ' ')} {new Date(log.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}

{log.reason || "System flagged event."}

Ref: {log.sponsorshipId}

)) )}
); } function MetricCard({ icon, title, value, color, bg }: { icon: any, title: string, value: number, color: string, bg: string }) { return (

{/* Image Frame */}
{/* Placeholder Image */}
Founder Portrait with Students
{/* */} {/* Signature Overlay */}
Ali Hassan
{/* Editorial Content */}
The Origin Story

"I could not look away."

Ten years ago, I visited a remote village in Sindh. I expected to see poverty. What I saw instead was untapped brilliance.

Children wrote in the sand because they had no paper. They learned under the scorching sun because they had no roof. Yet, their eyes burned with a hunger for knowledge I had never seen before.

"We aren't just building schools. We are building the cathedrals of the future, one brick at a time."

That day, I made a promise. I would not stop until every child, in every village, had a seat in a classroom. Today, 58 schools later, that promise is kept by people like you.

{/* Small avatar */}

Ali Hassan

Founder & Executive Director

import Link from "next/link"; import { PieChart, ShieldCheck, ArrowRight, FileText } from "lucide-react"; import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"; async function getTransparencyMetrics() { try { const stats = await prisma.programSnapshot.aggregate({ _sum: { fundsRaised: true, } }); return { fundsRouted: stats._sum.fundsRaised ? Number(stats._sum.fundsRaised) : 142050, isLive: !!stats._sum.fundsRaised }; } catch { return { fundsRouted: 142050, isLive: false }; } } export async function DashboardTransparencyPreview() { const metrics = await getTransparencyMetrics(); return (
{/* Background embellishment */}
{/* Left: Interactive Preview Card */}
Live Ledger

Your Impact Dashboard

Real-time allocation tracking

{/* Mock Data Entry 1 */}
Education Support
65%
{/* Mock Data Entry 2 */}
Child Health Fund
25%
{/* Mock Data Entry 3 */}
Learning Materials
10%
Cryptographic Certificate Ready
PDF
{/* Right: Narrative */}
100% Transparency

Track every dollar you give.

Charity shouldn't be a black box. Our architecture ensures that from the moment you contribute, your funds are cryptographically mapped to the child's support utilization.

So far, our donors have tracked ${metrics.fundsRouted.toLocaleString()} in transparent impact.

View Donor Dashboard
); }

import Image from "next/image"; import Link from "next/link"; import { ArrowRight, Quote } from "lucide-react"; export function FounderStoryBlock() { return (
{/* Portrait Col */}
Sarah Jenkins
Founder & Executive Director
{/* Decorative Quote Mark */}
{/* Narrative Col */}

"We realized every child needed a champion."

Ten years ago, we realized that an isolated approach to child support wasn't enough. We recognized that true impact required a holistic sponsorship model that guaranteed access to education, supplies, and wellbeing services.

Every child deserves an environment where they can thrive, learn, and build a secure foundation for their future.

That's why we fundamentally changed our architecture. We connected everyday donors directly with a child's educational journey, ensuring verified and stable support through dedicated education partners.

Read Our Full Origin Story
); }

{/* Left: Text & Flow */}
The Sponsorship Journey

Sponsorship ensures access to education, supplies, and wellbeing services.

While sponsorship is presented at the child level, funds are ethically administered through verified education partners to ensure continuity, safeguarding, and resource stability.
